title: [Bug]:  `select count()` 有概率出现预期之外的结果
description: master分支版本，`select count()` 返回了预期之外的数值
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test3', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
